pi_items.source: Task description (task.json line 5) confirms 'Science' as target category. setup_moodle.sh line 247-250 creates this category. setup_task.sh line 44-50 verifies Science category exists in database.

Task description (task.json line 5) specifies 'teacher1 / Teacher1234!' login credentials. setup_moodle.sh line 283 creates user 'teacher1' with firstname 'Professor' and lastname 'Anderson'. setup_task.sh line 54-59 verifies teacher1 user exists in database.

Task description (task.json line 5) specifies course full name as 'Advanced Quantum Mechanics'. export_result.sh line 56 searches for this exact fullname in mdl_course_request table. verifier.py line 75 checks for this request name.

Task description (task.json line 5) specifies course short name as 'PHYS401'. export_result.sh line 70 extracts the shortname field from the course request. verifier.py implicitly verifies this through the export script's result.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures the Moodle 'Course Request' feature by enabling it and setting the default category to 'Science'. The teacher user 'teacher1' (Professor Anderson) submits a course request with fullname 'Advanced Quantum Mechanics' and shortname 'PHYS401'. All metadata values correspond to synthetic test data created during Moodle setup and used during task execution. The 'Science' category is created in setup_moodle.sh, the 'teacher1' user is created with firstname 'Professor' and lastname 'Anderson', and the course request is dynamically created by the agent during task execution.
